query:
SELECT
                p.id as entity_id,
                p.name,
                regexp_replace(
                    p.name,
                    $6,
                    '<macro_em>\1</macro_em>',
                    'gi'
                ) as name_highlighted,
                p."updatedAt" as updated_at
            FROM "Project" p
            WHERE p.id = ANY($1)
                AND p."deletedAt" IS NULL
                AND p.name ILIKE $2
                AND (
                    $4::timestamptz IS NULL
                    OR (p."updatedAt", p.id) < ($4, $5)
                )
            ORDER BY p."updatedAt" DESC, p.id DESC
            LIMIT $3
